than two meet at a point, the function will fail.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `edges`           | [`Query`](#Query)     | The edges to be       |
|                       |                       | extracted.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opExtrude](#opExtrude-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Extrudes one or more edges or faces in a given direction with one or two
end conditions. Faces get extruded into solid bodies and edges get
extruded into sheet bodies.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `entities`        | [`Query`](#Query)     | Edges and faces to    |
|                       |                       | extrude.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `direction`       | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | The 3d direction in   |
|                       |                       | which to extrude.     |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `evOwnerSketchPla   |
|                       |                       | ne(context, {"entity" |
|                       |                       |  : entities}).normal` |
|                       |                       | > to extrude          |
|                       |                       | > perpendicular to    |
|                       |                       | > the owner sketch    |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `evP                |
|                       |                       | lane(context, {"face" |
|                       |                       |  : entities}).normal` |
|                       |                       | > to extrude          |
|                       |                       | > perpendicular to    |
|                       |                       | > the first planar    |
|                       |                       | > entity              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `endBound`        | [`Bounding            | The type of bound at  |
|                       | Type`](#BoundingType) | the end of the        |
|                       |                       | extrusion. Cannot be  |
|                       |                       | `SYMMETRIC` or        |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_VERTEX`.       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | >                     |
|                       |                       |  `BoundingType.BLIND` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `endDepth`        | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `endBound` is         |
|                       |                       | `BLIND`.*             |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | How far from the      |
|                       |                       | `entities` to         |
|                       |                       | extrude.              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `1 * inch`          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `endBoundEntity`  | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `endBound` is         |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_SURFACE` or    |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_BODY`.*        |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The face or body that |
|                       |                       | provides the bound.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `en               | [`ValueWithUni        | *Optional*            |
| dTranslationalOffset` | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) |                       |
|                       |                       | The translational     |
|                       |                       | offset between the    |
|                       |                       | extrude end cap and   |
|                       |                       | the end bound entity. |
|                       |                       | The direction vector  |
|                       |                       | for this is the same  |
|                       |                       | as `direction`:       |
|                       |                       | negative values pull  |
|                       |                       | the end cap away from |
|                       |                       | the bound entity when |
|                       |                       | `endDepth` is         |
|                       |                       | positive. `endOffset` |
|                       |                       | will only have an     |
|                       |                       | effect if `endBound`  |
|                       |                       | is `UP_TO_SURFACE`,   |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_BODY`, or      |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_NEXT`.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `startBound`      | [`Bounding            | *Optional*            |
|                       | Type`](#BoundingType) |                       |
|                       |                       | The type of start     |
|                       |                       | bound. Default is for |
|                       |                       | the extrude to start  |
|                       |                       | at `entities`. Cannot |
|                       |                       | be `SYMMETRIC` or     |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_VERTEX`.       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 |                       | *Required if is       |
| isStartBoundOpposite` |                       | `UP_TO_SURFACE`,      |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_BODY`, or      |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_NEXT`.*        |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether the           |
|                       |                       | `startBound` extends  |
|                       |                       | in the opposite       |
|                       |                       | direction from the    |
|                       |                       | profile as the        |
|                       |                       | `endBound`. Defaults  |
|                       |                       | to `true` if not      |
|                       |                       | supplied.             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `startDepth`      | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `startBound` is       |
|                       |                       | `BLIND`.*             |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | How far from the      |
|                       |                       | `entities` to start   |
|                       |                       | the extrude. The      |
|                       |                       | direction vector for  |
|                       |                       | this is the negative  |
|                       |                       | of `direction`:       |
|                       |                       | positive values make  |
|                       |                       | the extrusion longer  |
|                       |                       | when `endDepth` is    |
|                       |                       | positive.             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|    `startBoundEntity` |                       | `startBound` is       |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_SURFACE` or    |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_BODY`.*        |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The face or body that |
|                       |                       | provides the bound.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `star             | [`ValueWithUni        | *Optional*            |
| tTranslationalOffset` | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) |                       |
|                       |                       | The translational     |
|                       |                       | offset between the    |
|                       |                       | extrude start cap and |
|                       |                       | the start bound       |
|                       |                       | entity. The direction |
|                       |                       | vector for this is    |
|                       |                       | the negative of       |
|                       |                       | `direction`: negative |
|                       |                       | values pull the end   |
|                       |                       | cap away from the     |
|                       |                       | bound entity when     |
|                       |                       | `startDepth` is       |
|                       |                       | positive.             |
|                       |                       | `startOffset` will    |
|                       |                       | only have an effect   |
|                       |                       | if `startBound` is    |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_SURFACE`,      |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_BODY`, or      |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_NEXT`.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opFaceBlend](#opFaceBlend-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Performs a face blend between two walls of faces.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `side1`           | [`Query`](#Query)     | First set of faces,   |
|                       |                       | must belong to the    |
|                       |                       | same body.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `side2`           | [`Query`](#Query)     | Second set of faces,  |
|                       |                       | must belong to the    |
|                       |                       | same body.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `flipSide1Normal` | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Wether to flip side   |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | 1\'s normal.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `flipSide2Normal` | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Wether to flip side   |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | 2\'s normal.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `propagation`     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to propagate  |
|                       |                       | the blend.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `propagationType` | [`Fac                 | *Optional*            |
|                       | eBlendPropagation`](# |                       |
|                       | FaceBlendPropagation) | How to propagate the  |
|                       |                       | blend.                |
|                       |                       | FaceBle               |
|                       |                       | ndPropagation.TANGENT |
|                       |                       | will propagate over   |
|                       |                       | tangent faces.        |
|                       |                       | FaceBlen              |
|                       |                       | dPropagation.ADJACENT |
|                       |                       | will propagate over   |
|                       |                       | all adjacent faces.   |
|                       |                       | FaceBl                |
|                       |                       | endPropagation.CUSTOM |
|                       |                       | allows specification  |
|                       |                       | of a maximum angle    |
|                       |                       | between faces for     |
|                       |                       | propagation. Defaults |
|                       |                       | is                    |
|                       |                       | FaceBlen              |
|                       |                       | dPropagation.TANGENT. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`ValueWithUni        | *Optional*            |
|    `propagationAngle` | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) |                       |
|                       |                       | Maximum angle between |
|                       |                       | faces for             |
|                       |                       | propagation. Used if  |
|                       |                       | propagationType is    |
|                       |                       | FaceBle               |
|                       |                       | ndPropagation.CUSTOM. |
|                       |                       | Default is 0 \*       |
|                       |                       | radian.               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `crossSection`    | [`FaceB               | The cross section     |
|                       | lendCrossSection`](#F | type of the blend.    |
|                       | aceBlendCrossSection) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `spine`           | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `crossSection` is     |
|                       |                       | `DISC`.*              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The spine of the      |
|                       |                       | blend. The blend\'s   |
|                       |                       | cross section will be |
|                       |                       | orthogonal to the     |
|                       |                       | spine.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`BlendControlType    | Whether the blend is  |
|    `blendControlType` | `](#BlendControlType) | controled by a        |
|                       |                       | constant radius or a  |
|                       |                       | constant width.       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`FaceBlendCrossS     | What shape the cross  |
|   `crossSectionShape` | ectionShape`](#FaceBl | section of the blend  |
|                       | endCrossSectionShape) | will be.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `radius`          | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `blendControlType` is |
|                       |                       | `RADIUS`.*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The radius of the     |
|                       |                       | cross section.        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `width`           | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `blendControlType` is |
|                       |                       | `WIDTH`.*             |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The width of the      |
|                       |                       | blend.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `asymmetric`      | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Wether the radius or  |
|                       |                       | width is the same on  |
|                       |                       | each wall.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondRadius`    | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `blendControlType` is |
|                       |                       | `RADIUS` and          |
|                       |                       | `asymmetric` is       |
|                       |                       | `true`.*              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The radius of the     |
|                       |                       | cross section from    |
|                       |                       | side 2.               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `widthRatio`      | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `blendControlType` is |
|                       |                       | `WIDTH` and           |
|                       |                       | `asymmetric` is       |
|                       |                       | `true`.*              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | How the blend will be |
|                       |                       | divided between the   |
|                       |                       | walls. If widthRatio  |
|                       |                       | \< 1, it will be      |
|                       |                       | wider towards side 1. |
|                       |                       | If widthRatio \> 1,   |
|                       |                       | it will be wider      |
|                       |                       | towards side 2.       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `rho`             | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `crossSectionShape`   |
|                       |                       | is `CONIC`*           |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Parameter of the      |
|                       |                       | conic cross section   |
|                       |                       | shape.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `magnitude`       | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `crossSectionShape`   |
|                       |                       | is `CURVATURE`*       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Parameter of the      |
|                       |                       | curvature cross       |
|                       |                       | section shape.        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|    `tangentHoldLines` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to use the    |
|                       |                       | content of            |
|                       |                       | `tangentEdges` and    |
|                       |                       | `                     |
|                       |                       | inverseTangentEdges`. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `tangentEdges`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges to use as       |
|                       |                       | tangent hold lines.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
| `inverseTangentEdges` |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges to use as       |
|                       |                       | inverse tangent hold  |
|                       |                       | lines.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `conicHoldLines`  | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to use the    |
|                       |                       | content of            |
|                       |                       | `conicEdges` and      |
|                       |                       | `inverseConicEdges`.  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `conicEdges`      | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges to use as conic |
|                       |                       | hold lines.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|   `inverseConicEdges` |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges to use as       |
|                       |                       | inverse conic hold    |
|                       |                       | lines.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasCliffEdges`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to use the    |
|                       |                       | content of            |
|                       |                       | `cliffEdges`.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `cliffEdges`      | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges to use as cliff |
|                       |                       | edges.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasCaps`         | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to use the    |
|                       |                       | content of `caps`.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `caps`            | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Optional*            |
|                       | variables.html#array) |                       |
|                       |                       | Entities and flip     |
|                       |                       | flags to use as caps. |
|                       |                       | Each map should       |
|                       |                       | contain an `entity`   |
|                       |                       | Query element and a   |
|                       |                       | `flip` boolean        |
|                       |                       | element.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasLimits`       | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to use the    |
|                       |                       | content of            |
|                       |                       | `limitPlane1`,        |
|                       |                       | `limitPlane2`,        |
|                       |                       | `faceLimits` and      |
|                       |                       | `edgeLimit`.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `limitPlane1`     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | First plane to limit  |
|                       |                       | the blend.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `limitPlane1Flip` | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether to flip the   |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | first plane normal.   |
|                       |                       | Defines which side of |
|                       |                       | the plane the blend   |
|                       |                       | will be.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `limitPlane2`     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Second plane to limit |
|                       |                       | the blend.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `limitPlane2Flip` | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether to flip the   |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | first plane normal.   |
|                       |                       | Defines which side of |
|                       |                       | the plane the blend   |
|                       |                       | will be.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `faceLimits`      | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Faces to use as       |
|                       |                       | limits to the blend.  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `edgeLimit`       | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Optional*            |
|                       | variables.html#array) |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges and adjacent    |
|                       |                       | faces to use as       |
|                       |                       | limits. Each map      |
|                       |                       | should contain an     |
|                       |                       | `edge` Query element  |
|                       |                       | and an                |
|                       |                       | `edgeLimitSide` query |
|                       |                       | element.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasHelpPoint`    | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to use the    |
|                       |                       | content of            |
|                       |                       | `helpPoint`.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `helpPoint`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Vertex or mate        |
|                       |                       | connector to use as   |
|                       |                       | help point. In case   |
|                       |                       | the blend parameters  |
|                       |                       | create several        |
|                       |                       | blends, only the      |
|                       |                       | blend closest to the  |
|                       |                       | help point will be    |
|                       |                       | kept.                 |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `trim`            | [`FaceBlendTrimType`  | *Optional*            |
|                       | ](#FaceBlendTrimType) |                       |
|                       |                       | How to trim the       |
|                       |                       | blend.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `detach`          | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether not to attach |
|                       |                       | the blend(s) to the   |
|                       |                       | sides, creating new   |
|                       |                       | sheet bodies.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `showIsocurves`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Show graphical        |
|                       |                       | representation of a   |
|                       |                       | subset of             |
|                       |                       | isoparameteric curves |
|                       |                       | of the created        |
|                       |                       | surface. Default      |
|                       |                       | `false`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `curveCount`      | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Optional*            |
|                       | ariables.html#number) |                       |
|                       |                       | When `showIsocurves`  |
|                       |                       | is `true`, the number |
|                       |                       | of curves to draw in  |
|                       |                       | each direction of the |
|                       |                       | grid. Default `10`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opFillet](#opFillet-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

For edges, performs a fillet on the edge. For faces, performs a fillet
on all edges adjacent to the face.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `entities`        | [`Query`](#Query)     | Edges and faces to    |
|                       |                       | fillet.               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `radius`          | [`ValueWithUni        | The fillet radius.    |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `1 * inch`          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|  `tangentPropagation` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | `true` to propagate   |
|                       |                       | the fillet along      |
|                       |                       | edges tangent to      |
|                       |                       | those passed in.      |
|                       |                       | Default is `false`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `crossSection`    | [                     | *Optional*            |
|                       | `FilletCrossSection`] |                       |
|                       | (#FilletCrossSection) | Fillet cross section. |
|                       |                       | One of `CIRCULAR`,    |
|                       |                       | `CONIC`, `CURVATURE`. |
|                       |                       | Default is            |
|                       |                       | `CIRCULAR`.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `rho`             | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `crossSection` is     |
|                       |                       | `CONIC`.*             |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A number between 0    |
|                       |                       | and 1, specifying the |
|                       |                       | Rho value of a conic  |
|                       |                       | fillet                |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0.01` creates a    |
|                       |                       | > flat,               |
|                       |                       | > nearly-chamfered    |
|                       |                       | > shape.              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0.99` creates a    |
|                       |                       | > pointed,            |
|                       |                       | > nearly-unchanged    |
|                       |                       | > shape.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `magnitude`       | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `crossSection` is     |
|                       |                       | `CURVATURE`.*         |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A number between 0    |
|                       |                       | and 1, specifying the |
|                       |                       | magnitude of          |
|                       |                       | curvature match.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Optional*            |
| `partialFilletBounds` | variables.html#array) |                       |
|                       |                       | An array of maps      |
|                       |                       | representing the      |
|                       |                       | boundaries of a       |
|                       |                       | partial fillet. Each  |
|                       |                       | map should contain a  |
|                       |                       | `boundaryEdge` query, |
|                       |                       | a `boundaryParameter` |
|                       |                       | value, a `isFlipped`  |
|                       |                       | boolean               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `[{ "boundaryEdg    |
|                       |                       | e" : edgeQuery0, "bou |
|                       |                       | ndaryParameter" : 0.3 |
|                       |                       | , "isFlipped" : false |
|                       |                       |  }, { "boundaryEdge"  |
|                       |                       | : edgeQuery1, "bounda |
|                       |                       | ryParameter" : 0.6, " |
|                       |                       | isFlipped" : true }]` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `isVariable`      | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Fillet controls can   |
|                       |                       | be varied at vertices |
|                       |                       | via `vertexSettings`. |
|                       |                       | Default is `false`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `vertexSettings`  | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Optional*            |
|                       | variables.html#array) |                       |
|                       |                       | An array of maps      |
|                       |                       | representing fillet   |
|                       |                       | settings at specified |
|                       |                       | vertices. Each map    |
|                       |                       | should contain a      |
|                       |                       | `vertex` query, a     |
|                       |                       | `vertexRadius` value, |
|                       |                       | a `variableMagnitude` |
|                       |                       | if the `crossSection` |
|                       |                       | is                    |
|                       |                       | `FilletCro            |
|                       |                       | ssSection.CURVATURE`, |
|                       |                       | and a `variableRho`   |
|                       |                       | if the `crossSection` |
|                       |                       | is                    |
|                       |                       | `Fille                |
|                       |                       | tCrossSection.CONIC`. |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `[{ "vert           |
|                       |                       | ex" : vertexQuery0, " |
|                       |                       | vertexRadius" : 1 * i |
|                       |                       | nch, "variableRho" :  |
|                       |                       | 0.2 }, { "vertex" : v |
|                       |                       | ertexQuery1, "vertexR |
|                       |                       | adius" : 2 * inch, "v |
|                       |                       | ariableRho" : 0.8 }]` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Optional*            |
| `pointOnEdgeSettings` | variables.html#array) |                       |
|                       |                       | An array of maps      |
|                       |                       | representing fillet   |
|                       |                       | settings at specified |
|                       |                       | points on edges. Each |
|                       |                       | map should contain an |
|                       |                       | `edge` query, an      |
|                       |                       | `edgeParameter`       |
|                       |                       | value, a              |
|                       |                       | `pointOnEdgeRadius`   |
|                       |                       | value, a              |
|                       |                       | `pointOn              |
|                       |                       | EdgeVariablMagnitude` |
|                       |                       | if the `crossSection` |
|                       |                       | is                    |
|                       |                       | `FilletCro            |
|                       |                       | ssSection.CURVATURE`, |
|                       |                       | and a                 |
|                       |                       | `po                   |
|                       |                       | intOnEdgeVariableRho` |
|                       |                       | if the `crossSection` |
|                       |                       | is                    |
|                       |                       | `Fille                |
|                       |                       | tCrossSection.CONIC`. |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `[{ "edge" : ed     |
|                       |                       | geQuery0, "edgeParame |
|                       |                       | ter" : 0.3, "pointOnE |
|                       |                       | dgeRadius" : 1 * inch |
|                       |                       |  }, { "edge" : edgeQu |
|                       |                       | ery1, "edgeParameter" |
|                       |                       |  : 0.6, "pointOnEdgeR |
|                       |                       | adius" : 2 * inch }]` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Required if          |
|    `smoothTransition` | riables.html#boolean) | `isVariable` is       |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to create a   |
|                       |                       | smoother transition   |
|                       |                       | between each vertex.  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|   `allowEdgeOverflow` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Allow `opFillet` to   |
|                       |                       | modify nearby edges   |
|                       |                       | to maintain the       |
|                       |                       | fillet profile.       |
|                       |                       | Default is `true`.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `keepEdges`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges you do not want |
|                       |                       | `opFillet` to modify  |
|                       |                       | if                    |
|                       |                       | `allowEdgeOverflow`   |
|                       |                       | is `true`.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `smoothCorners`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Allow `opFillet` to   |
|                       |                       | smooth all suitable   |
|                       |                       | corners and prevent   |
|                       |                       | creation of sharp     |
|                       |                       | edges. Default is     |
|                       |                       | `false`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `sm               | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
| oothCornerExceptions` |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Vertices you do not   |
|                       |                       | want `opFillet` to    |
|                       |                       | smooth if             |
|                       |                       | `smoothCorners` is    |
|                       |                       | `true`.               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `c                | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| reateDetachedSurface` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Operation does not    |
|                       |                       | modify the body of    |
|                       |                       | the selected edges,   |
|                       |                       | but results in        |
|                       |                       | surface geometry of   |
|                       |                       | fillet. Default is    |
|                       |                       | `false`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opFillSurface](#opFillSurface-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Generates a surface body from supplied boundary and internal
constraints. The boundaries are defined as edge queries for each
continuity constraint. The internal constraints may be defined as a set
of support vertices.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `edgesG0`         | [`Query`](#Query)     | The edges with        |
|                       |                       | position constraints. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `edgesG1`         | [`Query`](#Query)     | The edges with        |
|                       |                       | tangency constraints. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `edgesG2`         | [`Query`](#Query)     | The edges with        |
|                       |                       | curvature             |
|                       |                       | constraints.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `guideVertices`   | [`Query`](#Query)     | The vertices the      |
|                       |                       | resulting surface is  |
|                       |                       | expected to           |
|                       |                       | interpolate.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `showIsocurves`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Show graphical        |
|                       |                       | representation of a   |
|                       |                       | subset of             |
|                       |                       | isoparameteric curves |
|                       |                       | of the created        |
|                       |                       | surface. Default      |
|                       |                       | `false`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `curveCount`      | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Optional*            |
|                       | ariables.html#number) |                       |
|                       |                       | When `showIsocurves`  |
|                       |                       | is `true`, the number |
|                       |                       | of curves to draw in  |
|                       |                       | each direction of the |
|                       |                       | grid. Default `10`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opFitSpline](#opFitSpline-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Creates a 3D cubic spline curve through an array of 3D points.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `points`          | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | An array of `Vector`s |
|                       | variables.html#array) | with length units for |
|                       |                       | the spline to         |
|                       |                       | interpolate. If the   |
|                       |                       | first point is the    |
|                       |                       | same as the last      |
|                       |                       | point, the spline is  |
|                       |                       | closed.               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > [                   |
|                       |                       | >         vecto       |
|                       |                       | r( 1,  1,  1) * inch, |
|                       |                       | >         vecto       |
|                       |                       | r(-1,  1, -1) * inch, |
|                       |                       | >         vecto       |
|                       |                       | r( 1, -1, -1) * inch, |
|                       |                       | >         vecto       |
|                       |                       | r(-1, -1,  1) * inch, |
|                       |                       | >         vect        |
|                       |                       | or( 1,  1,  1) * inch |
|                       |                       | >     ]               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `parameters`      | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Optional*            |
|                       | variables.html#array) |                       |
|                       |                       | An array of doubles,  |
|                       |                       | parameters            |
|                       |                       | corresponding to the  |
|                       |                       | points.               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `startDerivative` | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A `Vector` with       |
|                       |                       | length units that     |
|                       |                       | specifies the         |
|                       |                       | derivative at the     |
|                       |                       | start of the          |
|                       |                       | resulting spline      |
|                       |                       | (according to the     |
|                       |                       | `arcLe                |
|                       |                       | ngthParameterization` |
|                       |                       | set to `false`).      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `endDerivative`   | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A `Vector` with       |
|                       |                       | length units that     |
|                       |                       | specifies the         |
|                       |                       | derivative at the end |
|                       |                       | of the resulting      |
|                       |                       | spline. Ignored if    |
|                       |                       | spline is closed.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | *Optional*            |
|  `start2ndDerivative` |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A `Vector` with       |
|                       |                       | length units that     |
|                       |                       | specifies the second  |
|                       |                       | derivative at the     |
|                       |                       | start of the          |
|                       |                       | resulting spline.     |
|                       |                       | Ignored if spline is  |
|                       |                       | closed, or if         |
|                       |                       | `startDerivative` is  |
|                       |                       | not defined           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | *Optional*            |
|    `end2ndDerivative` |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A `Vector` with       |
|                       |                       | length units that     |
|                       |                       | specifies the second  |
|                       |                       | derivative at the end |
|                       |                       | of the resulting      |
|                       |                       | spline. Ignored if    |
|                       |                       | spline is closed, or  |
|                       |                       | if `endDerivative` is |
|                       |                       | not defined           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `derivatives`     | [`map`](/FsDo         | *Optional*            |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
|                       |                       | A map of derivatives  |
|                       |                       | at non-end points.    |
|                       |                       | Entries should be     |
|                       |                       | `index : derivative`, |
|                       |                       | where `index` is an   |
|                       |                       | integer between 1 and |
|                       |                       | `size(points) - 2`    |
|                       |                       | and `derivative` is a |
|                       |                       | `Vector` that         |
|                       |                       | specifies the         |
|                       |                       | derivative at         |
|                       |                       | `points[index]`.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opFlipOrientation](#opFlipOrientation-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Reverses the orientation of sheet bodies.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `bodies`          | [`Query`](#Query)     | Sheet bodies whose    |
|                       |                       | orientation should be |
|                       |                       | flipped.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opFullRoundFillet](#opFullRoundFillet-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Creates a full round fillet, replacing the center face(s) with circular
profile face(s) of varying radius, joining the selected side faces.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `side1Face`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | A face on one side of |
|                       |                       | the blend.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `side2Face`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | A face on another     |
|                       |                       | side of the blend.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `centerFaces`     | [`Query`](#Query)     | The face(s) to be     |
|                       |                       | replaced.             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|  `tangentPropagation` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | `true` to propagate   |
|                       |                       | the fillet across     |
|                       |                       | side face tangencies. |
|                       |                       | Default is `true`.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opHelix](#opHelix-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Creates a helical and possibly spiral curve.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `direction`       | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | The direction of the  |
|                       |                       | helix axis.           |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `vector(0, 0, 1)`   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `axisStart`       | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | A point on the helix  |
|                       |                       | axis.                 |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `ve                 |
|                       |                       | ctor(0, 0, 0) * inch` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `startPoint`      | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | The start point of    |
|                       |                       | the infinite helix.   |
|                       |                       | Must be off the axis. |
|                       |                       | This is the point at  |
|                       |                       | which the created     |
|                       |                       | curve would actually  |
|                       |                       | start if the first    |
|                       |                       | number of `interval`  |
|                       |                       | is 0.                 |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `ve                 |
|                       |                       | ctor(1, 0, 0) * inch` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `interval`        | [`Vector`](#Vector)   | An array of two       |
|                       |                       | numbers denoting the  |
|                       |                       | interval of the helix |
|                       |                       | in terms of           |
|                       |                       | revolution counts.    |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `[0, 10]` will      |
|                       |                       | > create a curve with |
|                       |                       | > 10 revolutions.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `clockwise`       | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | EXAMPLE               |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` if this is a |
|                       |                       | > clockwise helix     |
|                       |                       | > when viewed along   |
|                       |                       | > `direction`.        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `helicalPitch`    | [`ValueWithUni        | Distance along the    |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | axis between          |
|                       |                       | successive            |
|                       |                       | revolutions.          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0.1 * inch` will   |
|                       |                       | > create a helix with |
|                       |                       | > 10 revolutions per  |
|                       |                       | > inch.               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0 * inch` produces |
|                       |                       | > a planar            |
|                       |                       | > Archimedean spiral. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `spiralPitch`     | [`ValueWithUni        | Change in radius      |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | between successive    |
|                       |                       | revolutions.          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0 * inch` produces |
|                       |                       | > a helix that lies   |
|                       |                       | > on a cylinder.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[opHole](#opHole-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))
returns [array](/FsDoc/variables.html#array)

Creates hole tools referencing a set of targets, optionally subtracting
the tools from the targets. If some tools cannot be built, the operation
will still succeed and indicate in its return value which holes failed
to build. If no tools can be built, the operation will fail.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `holeDefinition`  | [`HoleDefiniti        | The definition of the |
|                       | on`](#HoleDefinition) | shape of the desired  |
|                       |                       | holes.                |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `holeDe             |
|                       |                       | finition([holeProfile |
|                       |                       | (HolePositionReferenc |
|                       |                       | e.AXIS_POINT, 0 * inc |
|                       |                       | h, 0.1 * inch), holeP |
|                       |                       | rofile(HolePositionRe |
|                       |                       | ference.AXIS_POINT, 1 |
|                       |                       |  * inch, 0 * inch)])` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `axes`            | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | An array of           |
|                       | variables.html#array) | [`Line`](#Line)s each |
|                       |                       | of whose `origin`     |
|                       |                       | represents the start  |
|                       |                       | position of a hole,   |
|                       |                       | and whose `direction` |
|                       |                       | represents the drill  |
|                       |                       | direction of the      |
|                       |                       | hole.                 |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `[line(vector(-1    |
|                       |                       | , -1, 0) * inch, vect |
|                       |                       | or(0, 0, -1)), line(v |
|                       |                       | ector(1, 1, 0) * inch |
|                       |                       | , vector(0, 0, -1))]` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `identities`      | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Optional*            |
|                       | variables.html#array) |                       |
|                       |                       | An array of queries,  |
|                       |                       | one per axis in       |
|                       |                       | `axes`, used to       |
|                       |                       | disambiguate each of  |
|                       |                       | the created holes.    |
|                       |                       | Each query should     |
|                       |                       | resolve to exactly    |
|                       |                       | one entity. Providing |
|                       |                       | this information does |
|                       |                       | not change the        |
|                       |                       | geometric outcome,    |
|                       |                       | but stabilizes        |
|                       |                       | references to the     |
|                       |                       | holes with respect to |
|                       |                       | upstream changes to   |
|                       |                       | the model.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `targets`         | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `holeDefinition`      |
|                       |                       | contains any          |
|                       |                       | `profiles` that do    |
|                       |                       | not reference         |
|                       |                       | `HolePositionR        |
|                       |                       | eference.AXIS_POINT`, |
|                       |                       | or if                 |
|                       |                       | `subtractFromTargets` |
|                       |                       | is `true`*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A set of bodies to    |
|                       |                       | target. The shape of  |
|                       |                       | the produced holes is |
|                       |                       | dependent on the      |
|                       |                       | shape of these        |
|                       |                       | targets (as specified |
|                       |                       | in the supplied       |
|                       |                       | [`HoleDefinition      |
|                       |                       | `](#HoleDefinition)), |
|                       |                       | so the full set of    |
|                       |                       | targeted bodies       |
|                       |                       | should always be      |
|                       |                       | supplied, even if     |
|                       |                       | `subtractFromTargets` |
|                       |                       | is `false`.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| `subtractFromTargets` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | `true` if the hole    |
|                       |                       | geometry should be    |
|                       |                       | subtracted from the   |
|                       |                       | targets. `false` if   |
|                       |                       | the targets should    |
|                       |                       | not be modified, and  |
|                       |                       | the hole tools should |
|                       |                       | be outputted as new   |
|                       |                       | solid bodies. Default |
|                       |                       | is `true`. To         |
|                       |                       | subtract from a       |
|                       |                       | subset of targets,    |
|                       |                       | set this to `true`    |
|                       |                       | and supply a set of   |
|                       |                       | excluded targets as   |
|                       |                       | `targetsToExc         |
|                       |                       | ludeFromSubtraction`. |
|                       |                       | Removing the set of   |
|                       |                       | excluded targets from |
|                       |                       | `targets` instead of  |
|                       |                       | using                 |
|                       |                       | `targetsToEx          |
|                       |                       | cludeFromSubtraction` |
|                       |                       | is not the correct    |
|                       |                       | way to call this      |
|                       |                       | interface, and may    |
|                       |                       | result in the shape   |
|                       |                       | of the hole changing. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `targetsToEx      | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
| cludeFromSubtraction` |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | If supplied and       |
|                       |                       | `subtractFromTargets` |
|                       |                       | is `true`, the given  |
|                       |                       | targets are excluded  |
