## [deleteBodies](#module-deleteBodies.fs) {#module-deleteBodies.fs .file-header}

[CompositePartDeleteOptions](#CompositePartDeleteOptions) enum

Options that determine how the Delete part feature handles composite
parts

  Value        Description
  ------------ ------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `DELETE`     Any selected composite parts are deleted along with their constituents
  `DISSOLVE`   Constituents of composites are only deleted if explicitly selected
  `IGNORE`     Disallow selection of composite parts

[deleteBodies](#deleteBodies-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an
[`opDeleteBodies`](#opDeleteBodies-Context-Id-map).

## [deleteFace](#module-deleteFace.fs) {#module-deleteFace.fs .file-header}

[DeleteFaceType](#DeleteFaceType) enum

Specifies how the void resulting from delete face should be closed, if
at all.

  Value    Description
  -------- -----------------------------------------------------------
  `HEAL`   Close void by shrinking or growing adjacent faces.
  `CAP`    Close void by a simple surface passing through all edges.
  `VOID`   Do not close the void. Creates surface out of solids.

[deleteFace](#deleteFace-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an [`opDeleteFace`](#opDeleteFace-Context-Id-map).
Has options to heal the void created by removing the selected faces, or
to leave it open.

## [draft](#module-draft.fs) {#module-draft.fs .file-header}

[DraftFeatureType](#DraftFeatureType) enum

Types of drafts available for the draft feature.

  Value             Description
  ----------------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `NEUTRAL_PLANE`   Draft by holding the intersection between a set of faces and a neutral plane as a constant.
  `PARTING_LINE`    Draft by holding a set of parting edges as a constant.

[PartingLineSides](#PartingLineSides) enum

Specifies which faces to draft when drafting with
DraftFeatureType.PARTING_LINE.

  Value         Description
  ------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `ONE_SIDED`   Draft one of the faces attached to the parting line.
  `SYMMETRIC`   Draft both of the faces attached to the parting line symmetrically.
  `TWO_SIDED`   Draft both of the faces attached to the parting line with separate draft angles.

[draft](#draft-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an [`opDraft`](#opDraft-Context-Id-map).

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`DraftFeatureType    | *Optional*            |
|    `draftFeatureType` | `](#DraftFeatureType) |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies a           |
|                       |                       | `NEUTRAL_PLANE` or    |
|                       |                       | `PARTING_LINE` draft. |
|                       |                       | Default is            |
|                       |                       | `NEUTRAL_PLANE`.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `neutralPlane`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `draftFeatureType` is |
|                       |                       | `NEUTRAL_PLANE`*      |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A planar face or mate |
|                       |                       | connector defining    |
|                       |                       | both the neutral      |
|                       |                       | plane and pull        |
|                       |                       | direction of the the  |
|                       |                       | draft. The            |
|                       |                       | intersection of the   |
|                       |                       | drafted faces and the |
|                       |                       | neutral plane remains |
|                       |                       | unchanged. The pull   |
|                       |                       | direction of the      |
|                       |                       | draft will be the     |
|                       |                       | face normal or mate   |
|                       |                       | connector z-axis.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `draftFaces`      | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `draftFeatureType` is |
|                       |                       | `NEUTRAL_PLANE`*      |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The faces to draft    |
|                       |                       | for a `NEUTRAL_PLANE` |
|                       |                       | draft.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
| `pullDirectionEntity` |                       | `draftFeatureType` is |
|                       |                       | `PARTING_LINE`*       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | An entity defining    |
|                       |                       | the pull direction of |
|                       |                       | the draft. This       |
|                       |                       | entity should conform |
|                       |                       | to the                |
|                       |                       | `ALLOWS_DIRECTION`    |
|                       |                       | specification in      |
|                       |                       | [`Qu                  |
|                       |                       | eryFilterCompound`](# |
|                       |                       | QueryFilterCompound). |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `partingEdges`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `draftFeatureType` is |
|                       |                       | `PARTING_LINE`*       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges defining the    |
|                       |                       | parting line of the   |
|                       |                       | draft. These edges    |
|                       |                       | will remain unchanged |
|                       |                       | as some adjacent      |
|                       |                       | faces, as defined by  |
|                       |                       | `partingLineSides`,   |
|                       |                       | are drafted.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hintFaces`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Optional*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | For Onshape internal  |
|                       |                       | use. For              |
|                       |                       | `PARTING_LINE` draft, |
|                       |                       | specifies in advance  |
|                       |                       | which adjacent faces  |
|                       |                       | of `partingEdges`     |
|                       |                       | should be treated as  |
|                       |                       | more along the pull   |
|                       |                       | direction. When       |
|                       |                       | unspecified, the      |
|                       |                       | feature will use a    |
|                       |                       | geometric calculation |
|                       |                       | to determine this     |
|                       |                       | distinction.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`PartingLineSides    | *Required if          |
|    `partingLineSides` | `](#PartingLineSides) | `draftFeatureType` is |
|                       |                       | `PARTING_LINE`*       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies whether to  |
|                       |                       | draft one or both     |
|                       |                       | faces adjacent to the |
|                       |                       | parting edges, and    |
|                       |                       | whether the draft     |
|                       |                       | should be symmetrical |
|                       |                       | if drafting both      |
|                       |                       | faces. See            |
|                       |                       | [`PartingLineSides`   |
|                       |                       | ](#PartingLineSides). |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `alongPull`       | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Required if          |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | `PartingLineSides` is |
|                       |                       | `ONE_SIDED`*          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies which face  |
|                       |                       | will be drafted in a  |
|                       |                       | `ONE_SIDED`           |
|                       |                       | `PARTING_LINE` draft. |
|                       |                       | If `true`, the face   |
|                       |                       | which is more along   |
|                       |                       | the pull direction    |
|                       |                       | from the perspective  |
|                       |                       | of the parting edge   |
|                       |                       | is drafted. If        |
|                       |                       | `false`, the face     |
|                       |                       | which is more away    |
|                       |                       | from the pull         |
|                       |                       | direction from the    |
|                       |                       | perspective of the    |
|                       |                       | parting edge is       |
|                       |                       | drafted.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `angle`           | [`ValueWithUni        | The draft angle, must |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | be between 0 and 89.9 |
|                       |                       | degrees.              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `3 * degree`        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `pullDirection`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether the pull      |
|                       |                       | direction of the      |
|                       |                       | draft should be       |
|                       |                       | reversed. In          |
|                       |                       | equivalent terms,     |
|                       |                       | whether the draft     |
|                       |                       | should use `-angle`   |
|                       |                       | as the draft angle    |
|                       |                       | (`true`), or `angle`  |
|                       |                       | as the draft angle    |
|                       |                       | (`false`). Default is |
|                       |                       | `false`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondAngle`     | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `PartingLineSides` is |
|                       |                       | `TWO_SIDED`*          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The second draft      |
|                       |                       | angle for a           |
|                       |                       | `TWO_SIDED`           |
|                       |                       | `PARTING_LINE` draft. |
|                       |                       | Must be between 0 and |
|                       |                       | 89.9 degrees. Note    |
|                       |                       | that when using       |
|                       |                       | `TWO_SIDED`, `angle`  |
|                       |                       | will be applied to    |
|                       |                       | faces that are away   |
|                       |                       | from the pull         |
|                       |                       | direction, from the   |
|                       |                       | perspective of the    |
|                       |                       | edge. `secondAngle`   |
|                       |                       | will be applied to    |
|                       |                       | faces that are along  |
|                       |                       | the pull direction,   |
|                       |                       | from the perspective  |
|                       |                       | of the edge.          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `3 * degree`        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| `secondPullDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether the pull      |
|                       |                       | direction of the      |
|                       |                       | draft should be       |
|                       |                       | reversed for the      |
|                       |                       | second angle of a     |
|                       |                       | `TWO_SIDED` draft. In |
|                       |                       | equivalent terms,     |
|                       |                       | whether the draft     |
|                       |                       | should use            |
|                       |                       | `-secondAngle` as the |
|                       |                       | second draft angle    |
|                       |                       | (`true`), or          |
|                       |                       | `secondAngle` as the  |
|                       |                       | second draft angle    |
|                       |                       | (`false`). Default is |
|                       |                       | `false`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|  `tangentPropagation` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | For a `NEUTRAL_PLANE` |
|                       |                       | draft, `true` to      |
|                       |                       | propagate draft       |
|                       |                       | across tangent faces. |
|                       |                       | Default is `false`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `refe             | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| renceEdgePropagation` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | For a `PARTING_LINE`  |
|                       |                       | draft, `true` to      |
|                       |                       | extend the parting    |
|                       |                       | line across connected |
|                       |                       | edges of already      |
|                       |                       | included faces and    |
|                       |                       | tangent faces.        |
|                       |                       | Default is `false`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `reFillet`        | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | `true` to attempt to  |
|                       |                       | defillet draft faces  |
|                       |                       | before the draft and  |
|                       |                       | reapply the fillets   |
|                       |                       | after. Default is     |
|                       |                       | `false`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

## [extrude](#module-extrude.fs) {#module-extrude.fs .file-header}

[extrude](#extrude-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Create an extrude, as used in Onshape\'s extrude feature.

Internally, performs an [`opExtrude`](#opExtrude-Context-Id-map),
followed by an [`opBoolean`](#opBoolean-Context-Id-map), possibly
followed by a [`opDraft`](#opDraft-Context-Id-map), possibly in two
directions. If creating a simple extrusion, prefer using
[`opExtrude`](#opExtrude-Context-Id-map) alone.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `bodyType`        | [`Ext                 | *Optional*            |
|                       | endedToolBodyType`](# |                       |
|                       | ExtendedToolBodyType) | Specifies a `SOLID`   |
|                       |                       | or `SURFACE` or       |
|                       |                       | `THIN` extrude.       |
|                       |                       | Default is `SOLID`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `entities`        | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `bodyType` is         |
|                       |                       | `SOLID`*              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The planar faces      |
|                       |                       | and/or sketch regions |
|                       |                       | to extrude.           |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `qSketchRe          |
|                       |                       | gion(id + "sketch1")` |
|                       |                       | > specifies all       |
|                       |                       | > sketch regions of a |
|                       |                       | > given sketch.       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `surfaceEntities` | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `bodyType` is         |
|                       |                       | `SURFACE`*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The sketch curves to  |
|                       |                       | extrude.              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `qC                 |
|                       |                       | reatedBy(id + "sketch |
|                       |                       | 1", EntityType.EDGE)` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `endBound`        | [`Bounding            | *Optional*            |
|                       | Type`](#BoundingType) |                       |
|                       |                       | The end bounding      |
|                       |                       | condition for the     |
|                       |                       | extrude. Default is   |
|                       |                       | `BLIND`.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|   `oppositeDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to flip the  |
|                       |                       | > direction of the    |
|                       |                       | > extrude to point    |
|                       |                       | > opposite the        |
|                       |                       | > face/sketch normal. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `depth`           | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `endBound` is         |
|                       |                       | `BLIND`*              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A length specifying   |
|                       |                       | the extrude depth.    |
|                       |                       | For a blind extrude,  |
|                       |                       | specifies the depth   |
|                       |                       | of the first extrude  |
|                       |                       | direction. For a      |
|                       |                       | symmetric extrude,    |
|                       |                       | specifies the full    |
|                       |                       | extrude depth.        |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0.5 * inch`        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|  `endBoundEntityFace` |                       | `endBound` is         |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_SURFACE`*      |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies the face or |
|                       |                       | surface to bound the  |
|                       |                       | extrude.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|  `endBoundEntityBody` |                       | `endBound` is         |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_BODY`*         |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies the surface |
|                       |                       | or solid body to      |
|                       |                       | bound the extrude.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
| endBoundEntityVertex` |                       | `endBound` is         |
|                       |                       | `UP_TO_VERTEX`*       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies the vertex  |
|                       |                       | to bound the extrude. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasOffset`       | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to add a     |
|                       |                       | > translational       |
|                       |                       | > offset from the     |
|                       |                       | > selected face,      |
|                       |                       | > surface, solid body |
|                       |                       | > or vertex.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `offsetDistance`  | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if `offset` |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | is `true`*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The translational     |
|                       |                       | distance between the  |
|                       |                       | selected face,        |
|                       |                       | surface, solid body   |
|                       |                       | or vertex and the cap |
|                       |                       | of the extrude.       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0.5 * inch`        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `off              | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| setOppositeDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `false` to offset   |
|                       |                       | > away from the       |
|                       |                       | > selected end bound  |
|                       |                       | > (default)           |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to offset    |
|                       |                       | > into the selected   |
|                       |                       | > end bound           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasDraft`        | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to add a     |
|                       |                       | > draft to the        |
|                       |                       | > extrude.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `draftAngle`      | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `hasDraft` is `true`* |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The angle, as         |
|                       |                       | measured from the     |
|                       |                       | extrude direction, at |
|                       |                       | which to draft.       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `10 * degree`       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|  `draftPullDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `false` to draft    |
|                       |                       | > outwards (default)  |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to draft     |
|                       |                       | > inwards             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|  `hasSecondDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to specify a |
|                       |                       | > second direction.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`Bounding            | *Optional*            |
| secondDirectionBound` | Type`](#BoundingType) |                       |
|                       |                       | The bounding type of  |
|                       |                       | the second direction. |
|                       |                       | Can be different from |
|                       |                       | the bounding type of  |
|                       |                       | the first direction.  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondDirect     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| ionOppositeDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` will flip    |
|                       |                       | > the second end      |
|                       |                       | > direction to align  |
|                       |                       | > opposite the        |
|                       |                       | > plane/face\'s       |
|                       |                       | > normal.             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
| secondDirectionDepth` | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `                     |
|                       |                       | secondDirectionBound` |
|                       |                       | is `BLIND`*           |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | A length specifying   |
|                       |                       | the second            |
|                       |                       | direction\'s extrude  |
|                       |                       | depth.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondDire       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
| ctionBoundEntityFace` |                       | `                     |
|                       |                       | secondDirectionBound` |
|                       |                       | is `UP_TO_SURFACE`*   |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | specifies the face or |
|                       |                       | surface to bound the  |
|                       |                       | extrude.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondDire       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
| ctionBoundEntityBody` |                       | `                     |
|                       |                       | secondDirectionBound` |
|                       |                       | is `UP_TO_BODY`*      |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | specifies the surface |
|                       |                       | or solid body to      |
|                       |                       | bound the extrude.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondDirect     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
| ionBoundEntityVertex` |                       | `                     |
|                       |                       | secondDirectionBound` |
|                       |                       | is `UP_TO_VERTEX`*    |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | specifies the vertex  |
|                       |                       | to bound the extrude. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasS             | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| econdDirectionOffset` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to add a     |
|                       |                       | > translational       |
|                       |                       | > offset from the     |
|                       |                       | > selected face,      |
|                       |                       | > surface, solid body |
|                       |                       | > or vertex.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondDir        | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if `offset` |
| ectionOffsetDistance` | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | is `true`*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The translational     |
|                       |                       | distance between the  |
|                       |                       | selected face,        |
|                       |                       | surface, solid body   |
|                       |                       | or vertex and the cap |
|                       |                       | of the extrude.       |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `0.5 * inch`        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|   `secondDirectionOff | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
| setOppositeDirection` |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `false` to offset   |
|                       |                       | > away from the       |
|                       |                       | > selected second     |
|                       |                       | > direction end bound |
|                       |                       | > (default)           |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to offset    |
|                       |                       | > into the selected   |
|                       |                       | > second direction    |
|                       |                       | > end bound           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `has              | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| SecondDirectionDraft` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to add a     |
|                       |                       | > draft to the second |
|                       |                       | > direction extrude.  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `secondDirecti    | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| onDraftPullDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `false` to draft    |
|                       |                       | > the second          |
|                       |                       | > direction outwards  |
|                       |                       | > (default)           |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to draft the |
|                       |                       | > second direction    |
|                       |                       | > inwards             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `operationType`   | [`New                 | *Optional*            |
|                       | BodyOperationType`](# |                       |
|                       | NewBodyOperationType) | Specifies how the     |
|                       |                       | newly created body    |
|                       |                       | will be merged with   |
|                       |                       | existing bodies.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `defaultScope`    | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to merge     |
|                       |                       | > with all other      |
|                       |                       | > bodies              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `false` to merge    |
|                       |                       | > with `booleanScope` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `booleanScope`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `defaultScope` is     |
|                       |                       | `false`*              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The specified bodies  |
|                       |                       | to merge with.        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `wallShape`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `bodyType` is `THIN`* |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The specified planar  |
|                       |                       | face or sketch edges  |
|                       |                       | defining the thin     |
|                       |                       | wall shape.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `thickness1`      | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `bodyType` is `THIN`* |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The outwards          |
|                       |                       | thickness of the thin |
|                       |                       | wall.                 |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `thickness2`      | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `bodyType` is `THIN`* |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The inwards thickness |
|                       |                       | of the thin wall.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `flipWall`        | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to apply the |
|                       |                       | > first offset value  |
|                       |                       | > instead of the      |
|                       |                       | > second and vice     |
|                       |                       | > versa               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

The type of fit spline.

  Value        Description
  ------------ -------------------------------------------------
  `VERTICES`   Creates spline through selected vertices.
  `EDGES`      Approximates a set of edges by a single spline.

[fitSpline](#fitSpline-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

or [`opSplineThroughEdges`](#opSplineThroughEdges-Context-Id-map)
depending on selection

## [gusset](#module-gusset.fs) {#module-gusset.fs .file-header}

[GussetStyleType](#GussetStyleType) enum

Defines the shape of the gusset.

  Value         Description
  ------------- -------------
  `TRIANGLE`    
  `RECTANGLE`   

[GussetPosition](#GussetPosition) enum

Defines the alignment of the gusset.

  Value        Description
  ------------ -------------
  `CENTERED`   
  `ALIGNED`    

[gusset](#gusset-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Create gussets based on the selected edges.

## [helix](#module-helix.fs) {#module-helix.fs .file-header}

[AxisType](#AxisType) enum

Describes the type of body on which to create a helix.

  Value       Description
  ----------- ---------------------------------------------------------
  `SURFACE`   Impose a helix onto a cylinder or cone.
  `AXIS`      Revolve a helix around an axial edge or mate connector.
  `CIRCLE`    Revolve a helix along a circular path.

[PathType](#PathType) enum

Describes the parameter(s) to vary when computing the path of a helix.

  Value           Description
  --------------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `TURNS`         Allow only the number of turns (revolutions) to be varied.
  `PITCH`         Allow only the space between each turn (helical pitch) to be varied.
  `TURNS_PITCH`   Allow both turns and pitch to be varied. Always results in a cylindrical helix.

[StartType](#StartType) enum

Describes the starting condition of a helix.

  Value           Description
  --------------- -------------------------------------------------------------------
  `START_ANGLE`   Start the helix at an angle around the origin of the base.
  `START_POINT`   Start the helix at a point of choice along the plane of the base.

[EndType](#EndType) enum

Describes the ending condition of a helix.

  Value         Description
  ------------- -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `HEIGHT`      End the helix at a specified height.
  `END_POINT`   End the helix at a specified point along a perpendicular plane to the base.

[Direction](#Direction) enum

Describes the direction a helix turns while traveling along its axis.

  Value   Description
  ------- -------------------
  `CW`    Clockwise.
  `CCW`   Counterclockwise.

[helix](#helix-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an [`opHelix`](#opHelix-Context-Id-map).

## [hole](#module-hole.fs) {#module-hole.fs .file-header}

[HoleEndStyle](#HoleEndStyle) enum

Defines the end bound for the hole cut.

  Value             Description
  ----------------- ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `BLIND`           Cut holes to a specific depth.
  `BLIND_IN_LAST`   Cut holes through all parts but the last, then cut to a specific depth in the last part.
  `UP_TO_NEXT`      
  `UP_TO_ENTITY`    
  `THROUGH`         Cut holes with a through-all extrude.

[HoleEndStyleV2](#HoleEndStyleV2) enum

Defines the end bound for the hole cut.

  Value            Description
  ---------------- ---------------------------------------
  `BLIND`          Cut holes to a specific depth.
  `UP_TO_NEXT`     
  `UP_TO_ENTITY`   
  `THROUGH`        Cut holes with a through-all extrude.

[TipAngleStyle](#TipAngleStyle) enum

Defines the tip angle style for the hole tip

  Value         Description
  ------------- ----------------------------------
  `DEGREE118`   Tip angle is set at 118 degrees
  `DEGREE135`   Tip angle is set at 135 degrees
  `FLAT`        Tip angle is flat or 180 degrees
  `CUSTOM`      User inputs specific angle value

[HoleStartStyle](#HoleStartStyle) enum

Defines the options to adjust hole position.

  Value      Description
  ---------- --------------------------------------------------
  `PART`     Cut holes starting from the hole location.
  `SKETCH`   Cut holes starting from the first full entrance.
  `PLANE`    Cut holes starting at the selected input.

[parsePitch](#parsePitch-Context-string)
(context is [Context](#Context),
pitch is [string](/FsDoc/variables.html#string))

Parse and split the numerical and unit portion of a pitch string, e.g.
\"20 tpi\"

[buildPitchAnnotation](#buildPitchAnnotation-Context-string)
(context is [Context](#Context),
pitch is [string](/FsDoc/variables.html#string))

Parse a pitch string, e.g. \"20 tpi\" or \"1.5 mm, and return its
annotation suffix in imperial or metric format, e.g. -20 or x1.5

[hole](#hole-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Creates holes of specific dimensions and style, based either on standard
hole size, or by user-defined values. Each hole\'s position and
orientation are specified using sketch points.

[CSINK_ANGLE_BOUNDS](#CSINK_ANGLE_BOUNDS) const

Angle bounds for a hole countersink.

[computePitchValue](#computePitchValue-Context-string)
(context is [Context](#Context),
pitch is [string](/FsDoc/variables.html#string))

Extract value from pitch string

[clusterVertexQueries](#clusterVertexQueries-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), selected is [Query](#Query))
returns [array](/FsDoc/variables.html#array)

Expects `selected` query to evaluate to a set of vertices. Throws if
non-vertex is passed.

Clusters coincident vertices created by the same operation, it is
important to group by operation because we may have multiple sketches
with different normals which share a location. We would still want to
make two holes in that case.

Returns an array of vertices, each representing the \"first\" vertex of
a cluster, where \"first\" is determined by the query evaluation order
of `selected`. The overall ordering of the returned array will also
respect the query evaluation order of `selected`.

[holeTable](#holeTable) const

Computes one hole table for each part

## [importDerived](#module-importDerived.fs) {#module-importDerived.fs .file-header}

[DerivedPlacementType](#DerivedPlacementType) enum

Enum controlling the placement of derived entities in the target part
studio.

  Value                 Description
  --------------------- -------------
  `AT_ORIGIN`           
  `AT_MATE_CONNECTOR`   

[BuildFunction](#BuildFunction) type

A special type for functions defined as the `build` function for a Part
Studio, which return a context containing parts.

[canBeBuildFunction](#canBeBuildFunction-) (value) predicate

Typecheck for [`BuildFunction`](#BuildFunction)

[importDerived](#importDerived-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature using [`PartStudioData`](#PartStudioData) for including parts in
one Part Studio that were designed in another.

Location query determines where in the current Part Studio the
selections will be located. Bringing in multiple instances using
multiple location queries is allowed but not recommended.

One can use the origin or a mate connector from the base Part Studio for
placement in the current Part Studio.

[importForeign](#importForeign-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an
[`opImportForeign`](#opImportForeign-Context-Id-map), transforming the
result if necessary.

## [linearPattern](#module-linearPattern.fs) {#module-linearPattern.fs .file-header}

[linearPattern](#linearPattern-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Performs a body, face, or feature linear pattern. Internally, performs
an [`applyPattern`](#applyPattern-Context-Id-map-Transform), which in
turn performs an [`opPattern`](#opPattern-Context-Id-map) or, for a
feature pattern, calls the feature function.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `patternType`     | [`Patter              | *Optional*            |
|                       | nType`](#PatternType) |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies a `PART`,   |
|                       |                       | `FEATURE`, or `FACE`  |
|                       |                       | pattern. Default is   |
|                       |                       | `PART`.               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `entities`        | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `patternType` is      |
|                       |                       | `PART`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The parts to pattern. |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `qCr                |
|                       |                       | eatedBy(id + "extrude |
|                       |                       | 1", EntityType.BODY)` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `faces`           | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `patternType` is      |
|                       |                       | `FACE`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The faces to pattern. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Featur              | *Required if          |
|    `instanceFunction` | eList`](#FeatureList) | `patternType` is      |
|                       |                       | `FEATURE`*            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The                   |
|                       |                       | [`Featur              |
|                       |                       | eList`](#FeatureList) |
|                       |                       | of the features to    |
|                       |                       | pattern.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `directionOne`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | The direction of the  |
|                       |                       | pattern.              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `qCrea              |
|                       |                       | tedBy(newId() + "Righ |
|                       |                       | t", EntityType.FACE)` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `distance`        | [`ValueWithUni        | The distance between  |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | each pattern entity.  |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `1.0 * inch` to     |
|                       |                       | > space the pattern   |
|                       |                       | > entities 1 inch     |
|                       |                       | > apart.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `instanceCount`   | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | The resulting number  |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | of pattern entities,  |
|                       |                       | unless `isCentered`   |
|                       |                       | is `true`.            |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `2` to have 2       |
|                       |                       | > resulting pattern   |
|                       |                       | > entities (including |
|                       |                       | > the seed).          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|   `oppositeDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to switch    |
|                       |                       | > the direction of    |
|                       |                       | > the pattern along   |
|                       |                       | > `directionOne`.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `isCentered`      | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to center the |
|                       |                       | pattern on the seed.  |
|                       |                       | When set to `true`,   |
|                       |                       | `instanceCount - 1`   |
|                       |                       | pattern entities are  |
|                       |                       | created along each    |
|                       |                       | direction of          |
|                       |                       | `directionOne`.       |
|                       |                       | Default is `false`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasSecondDir`    | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` if the       |
|                       |                       | > pattern should      |
|                       |                       | > extend in two       |
|                       |                       | > directions rather   |
|                       |                       | > than one, creating  |
|                       |                       | > a grid of pattern   |
|                       |                       | > entities.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `directionTwo`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `hasSecondDir` is     |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The second direction  |
|                       |                       | of the pattern.       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `distanceTwo`     | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `hasSecondDir` is     |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The distance between  |
|                       |                       | each pattern entity   |
|                       |                       | in the second         |
|                       |                       | direction.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|    `instanceCountTwo` | ariables.html#number) | `hasSecondDir` is     |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The resulting number  |
|                       |                       | of pattern entities   |
|                       |                       | in the second         |
|                       |                       | direction, unless     |
|                       |                       | `isCentered` is       |
|                       |                       | `true`.               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
| oppositeDirectionTwo` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to switch    |
|                       |                       | > the direction of    |
|                       |                       | > the pattern along   |
|                       |                       | > `directionTwo`.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `isCenteredTwo`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to center the |
|                       |                       | second direction of   |
|                       |                       | the pattern on the    |
|                       |                       | seed. When set to     |
|                       |                       | `true`,               |
|                       |                       | `instanceCount - 1`   |
|                       |                       | pattern entities are  |
|                       |                       | created along each    |
|                       |                       | direction of          |
|                       |                       | `directionTwo`.       |
|                       |                       | Default is `false`.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `operationType`   | [`New                 | *Optional*            |
|                       | BodyOperationType`](# |                       |
|                       | NewBodyOperationType) | Specifies how the     |
|                       |                       | newly created body    |
|                       |                       | will be merged with   |
|                       |                       | existing bodies.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `defaultScope`    | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to merge     |
|                       |                       | > with all other      |
|                       |                       | > bodies              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `false` to merge    |
|                       |                       | > with `booleanScope` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `booleanScope`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `defaultScope` is     |
|                       |                       | `false`*              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The specified bodies  |
|                       |                       | to merge with.        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `skipInstances`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to exclude    |
|                       |                       | certain instances of  |
|                       |                       | the pattern.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | *Required if          |
|    `skippedInstances` | variables.html#array) | `skipInstances` is    |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Which instances of    |
|                       |                       | the pattern to skip.  |
|                       |                       | Each is denoted by    |
|                       |                       | one index for each    |
|                       |                       | direction, either of  |
|                       |                       | which may be negative |
|                       |                       | if `isCentered` or    |
|                       |                       | `isCenteredTwo`       |
|                       |                       | respectively is       |
|                       |                       | `true`.               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `[{ index1: -3, ind |
|                       |                       | ex2: 1 }, { index1: 0 |
|                       |                       | , index2: -2 }, { ind |
|                       |                       | ex1: 5, index2: 0 }]` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

  `NORMAL_TO_GUIDE`    
  `TANGENT_TO_GUIDE`   
  `MATCH_TANGENT`      
  `MATCH_CURVATURE`
