## [mateConnector](#module-mateConnector.fs) {#module-mateConnector.fs .file-header}

[mateConnector](#mateConnector-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an
[`opMateConnector`](#opMateConnector-Context-Id-map).

The parameters below are designed for interactive use in the feature
dialog. In FeatureScript, it is preferred to calculate the resulting
coordinate system directly, and pass this coordinate system to
`opMateConnector`.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `originQuery`     | [`Query`](#Query)     | The entity on which   |
|                       |                       | to place the mate     |
|                       |                       | connector             |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `qFarthestAlong(qC  |
|                       |                       | reatedBy(id + "extrud |
|                       |                       | e1", EntityType.VERTE |
|                       |                       | X), vector(1, 1, 1))` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`E                   | A method of producing |
| `entityInferenceType` | ntityInferenceType`]( | the coordinate system |
|                       | #EntityInferenceType) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `Entit              |
|                       |                       | yInferenceType.POINT` |
|                       |                       | > to place on a       |
|                       |                       | > vertex, with the    |
|                       |                       | > world coordinate    |
|                       |                       | > system              |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `EntityInf          |
|                       |                       | erenceType.MID_POINT` |
|                       |                       | > to place at the     |
|                       |                       | > midpoint of an      |
|                       |                       | > edge, with the Z    |
|                       |                       | > axis along the edge |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`query`](#           | *Optional*            |
| secondaryOriginQuery` | query-Id-string--map) |                       |
|                       |                       | Additional entity to  |
|                       |                       | inference with, used  |
|                       |                       | in some inference     |
|                       |                       | types.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `originType`      | [                     | *Optional*            |
|                       | `OriginCreationType`] |                       |
|                       | (#OriginCreationType) | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `OriginCreationT    |
|                       |                       | ype.BETWEEN_ENTITIES` |
|                       |                       | > to place mate       |
|                       |                       | > connector origin on |
|                       |                       | > the midpoint        |
|                       |                       | > between the         |
|                       |                       | > speicified origin   |
|                       |                       | > and the location of |
|                       |                       | > `or                 |
|                       |                       | iginAdditionalQuery`. |
|                       |                       | > Default is          |
|                       |                       | > `OriginCre          |
|                       |                       | ationType.ON_ENTITY`. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `o                | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
| riginAdditionalQuery` |                       | `originType` is       |
|                       |                       | `OriginCreationTy     |
|                       |                       | pe.BETWEEN_ENTITIES`* |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `flipPrimary`     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to flip the  |
|                       |                       | > resulting Z axis    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`MateC               | *Optional*            |
|   `secondaryAxisType` | onnectorAxisType`](#M |                       |
|                       | ateConnectorAxisType) | Changes which axis    |
|                       |                       | (perpendicular to Z)  |
|                       |                       | will point along the  |
|                       |                       | secondary direction.  |
|                       |                       | Default is            |
|                       |                       | `MateConn             |
|                       |                       | ectorAxisType.PLUS_X` |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `realign`         | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | `true` to change      |
|                       |                       | direction of axes     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|    `primaryAxisQuery` |                       | `realign` is `true`*  |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Entity with axis to   |
|                       |                       | define the resulting  |
|                       |                       | Z direction           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|  `secondaryAxisQuery` |                       | `realign` is `true`*  |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Entity with axis to   |
|                       |                       | define the secondary  |
|                       |                       | axis (set by          |
|                       |                       | `secondaryAxisType`)  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `transform`       | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to change the |
|                       |                       | origin position with  |
|                       |                       | `translationX`,       |
|                       |                       | `translationY`, and   |
|                       |                       | `translationZ`. The   |
|                       |                       | X/Y/Z directions of   |
|                       |                       | this translation are  |
|                       |                       | affected by           |
|                       |                       | `primaryAxisQuery`    |
|                       |                       | and                   |
|                       |                       | `secondaryAxisQuery`  |
|                       |                       | and                   |
|                       |                       | `secondaryAxisType`,  |
|                       |                       | but not by            |
|                       |                       | `rotationType` and    |
|                       |                       | `rotation`            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `translationX`    | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `transform` is        |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Distance to move the  |
|                       |                       | resulting origin      |
|                       |                       | along resulting X     |
|                       |                       | direction.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `translationY`    | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `transform` is        |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Distance to move the  |
|                       |                       | resulting origin      |
|                       |                       | along resulting Y     |
|                       |                       | direction             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `translationZ`    | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `transform` is        |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Distance to move the  |
|                       |                       | resulting origin      |
|                       |                       | along resulting Z     |
|                       |                       | direction             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `rotationType`    | [`Rotation            | *Optional*            |
|                       | Type`](#RotationType) |                       |
|                       |                       | Axis to rotate around |
|                       |                       | (does not change      |
|                       |                       | origin position)      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `rotation`        | [`ValueWithUni        | *Optional*            |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) |                       |
|                       |                       | Angle to rotate       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|    `requireOwnerPart` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | Whether to error if   |
|                       |                       | owner part is not     |
|                       |                       | provided. Default is  |
|                       |                       | `true`. If `false`,   |
|                       |                       | the mate connector    |
|                       |                       | may be an independent |
|                       |                       | body with no owner    |
|                       |                       | part.                 |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `ownerPart`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `requireOwnerPart` is |
|                       |                       | not `false`*          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Part on which to      |
|                       |                       | attach the resulting  |
|                       |                       | mate connector        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `specifyNormal`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` override the |
|                       |                       | > Z direction with    |
|                       |                       | > the known vector    |
|                       |                       | > `(defi              |
|                       |                       | nition.nx, definition |
|                       |                       | .ny, definition.nz)`. |
|                       |                       | > Used internally     |
|                       |                       | > when the mate       |
|                       |                       | > connector is placed |
|                       |                       | > on a mesh.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `nx`              | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `specifyNormal` is    |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `ny`              | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `specifyNormal` is    |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `nz`              | [`number`](/FsDoc/v   | *Required if          |
|                       | ariables.html#number) | `specifyNormal` is    |
|                       |                       | `true`*               |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

## [mirror](#module-mirror.fs) {#module-mirror.fs .file-header}

[mirror](#mirror-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature creating a single copy of some features, bodies, or faces,
mirrored about a given entity. Internally, performs an
[`applyPattern`](#applyPattern-Context-Id-map-Transform), which in turn
performs an [`opPattern`](#opPattern-Context-Id-map) or, for a feature
mirror, calls the feature function.

## [modifyFillet](#module-modifyFillet.fs) {#module-modifyFillet.fs .file-header}

[ModifyFilletType](#ModifyFilletType) enum

Defines the action of a `modifyFillet` feature.

  Value             Description
  ----------------- -------------
  `CHANGE_RADIUS`   
  `REMOVE_FILLET`   

[modifyFillet](#modifyFillet-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an
[`opModifyFillet`](#opModifyFillet-Context-Id-map).

## [moveCurveBoundary](#module-moveCurveBoundary.fs) {#module-moveCurveBoundary.fs .file-header}

[trimCurve](#trimCurve-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Extend or trim a curve. This is a thin wrapper around
[`opMoveCurveBoundary`](#opMoveCurveBoundary-Context-Id-map).

## [moveFace](#module-moveFace.fs) {#module-moveFace.fs .file-header}

[moveFace](#moveFace-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an [`opMoveFace`](#opMoveFace-Context-Id-map).

[deripEdges](#deripEdges-Context-Id-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
edges is [Query](#Query))
returns [boolean](/FsDoc/variables.html#boolean)

Splits input sheet metal edges and adjusts them to lie on corresponding
sheet metal part faces.

## [mutualTrim](#module-mutualTrim.fs) {#module-mutualTrim.fs .file-header}

[mutualTrim](#mutualTrim-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Trim two adjacent surfaces by extending intersections to complete the
trim.

## [offsetCurveOnFace](#module-offsetCurveOnFace.fs) {#module-offsetCurveOnFace.fs .file-header}

[OffsetCurveScope](#OffsetCurveScope) enum

Drives the `extend` and `imprint` booleans in opOffsetCurveOnFace.

  Value                       Description
  --------------------------- -------------
  `OFFSET`                    
  `OFFSET_AND_EXTEND`         
  `OFFSET_EXTEND_AND_SPLIT`   

[GapFill](#GapFill) enum

Whether to use linear or rounded extensions to connect discontinuities
within offset wires.

  Value      Description
  ---------- -------------
  `LINEAR`   
  `ROUND`    

[offsetCurveOnFace](#offsetCurveOnFace-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an offset curve.

## [offsetSurface](#module-offsetSurface.fs) {#module-offsetSurface.fs .file-header}

[offsetSurface](#offsetSurface-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature performing an
[`opExtractSurface`](#opExtractSurface-Context-Id-map). Allows creation
of an offset surface from faces, surfaces, or sketch regions. Offset may
be zero. Offset direction may be flipped using the oppositeDirection
flag.

## [projectCurves](#module-projectCurves.fs) {#module-projectCurves.fs .file-header}

[CurveProjectionType](#CurveProjectionType) enum

Specifies the method used for generating intersection curves.

  Value             Description
  ----------------- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `TWO_SKETCHES`    Performs [`opExtrude`](#opExtrude-Context-Id-map) to convert sketches into surface, then uses [`opBoolean`](#opBoolean-Context-Id-map) to intersect those surfaces.
  `CURVE_TO_FACE`   Performs [`opDropCurve`](#opDropCurve-Context-Id-map) to project curves onto faces.

[projectCurves](#projectCurves-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature creating projected curves.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`C                   | *Optional*            |
| `curveProjectionType` | urveProjectionType`]( |                       |
|                       | #CurveProjectionType) | The method used for   |
|                       |                       | generating            |
|                       |                       | intersection curves.  |
|                       |                       | Default is            |
|                       |                       | `TWO_SKETCHES`.       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `sketchEdges1`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `curveProjectionType` |
|                       |                       | is `TWO_SKETCHES`*    |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges from a single   |
|                       |                       | sketch that will be   |
|                       |                       | extruded to perform   |
|                       |                       | an intersection.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `sketchEdges2`    | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `curveProjectionType` |
|                       |                       | is `TWO_SKETCHES`*    |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges from a single   |
|                       |                       | sketch that will be   |
|                       |                       | extruded to perform   |
|                       |                       | an intersection.      |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `dropTools`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `curveProjectionType` |
|                       |                       | is `CURVE_TO_FACE`*   |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Edges that will be    |
|                       |                       | projected onto        |
|                       |                       | `targets`.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `projectionType`  | [`ProjectionTy        | *Required if          |
|                       | pe`](#ProjectionType) | `curveProjectionType` |
|                       |                       | is `CURVE_TO_FACE`*   |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies whether to  |
|                       |                       | project along a       |
|                       |                       | direction or the face |
|                       |                       | normal of `targets`.  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `directionQuery`  | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `projectionType` is   |
|                       |                       | `DIRECTION`*          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Specifies the         |
|                       |                       | direction of          |
|                       |                       | projection.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Required if          |
|   `oppositeDirection` | riables.html#boolean) | `projectionType` is   |
|                       |                       | `DIRECTION`*          |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | If true, negates the  |
|                       |                       | direction supplied by |
|                       |                       | `directionQuery`.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `targets`         | [`Query`](#Query)     | *Required if          |
|                       |                       | `curveProjectionType` |
|                       |                       | is `CURVE_TO_FACE`*   |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | Faces, sheet bodies,  |
|                       |                       | or solid bodies to    |
|                       |                       | project onto.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

## [queryVariable](#module-queryVariable.fs) {#module-queryVariable.fs .file-header}

[SelectionType](#SelectionType) enum

Allowed selection types to create query variable.

  Value                    Description
  ------------------------ -------------
  `SELECTION`              
  `CREATED_BY`             
  `OWNED_BY`               
  `PROTRUSION`             
  `POCKET`                 
  `HOLE`                   
  `FILLETS`                
  `BOUNDED_FACES`          
  `LOOP_CHAIN_CONNECTED`   
  `PARALLEL`               
  `TANGENT_CONNECTED`      
  `MATCHING`               
  `ALL_SOLID_BODIES`       
  `EDGE_CONVEXITY`         

[SeedType](#SeedType) enum

Some selection types accept either faces or edges, not both. This enum
allows picking which one.

  Value    Description
  -------- -------------
  `FACE`   
  `EDGE`   

[FilletCompare](#FilletCompare) enum

Subset of CompareType with just types allowed in qFilletFaces

  Value             Description
  ----------------- -------------
  `EQUAL`           
  `LESS_EQUAL`      
  `GREATER_EQUAL`   

[BodyTypeOptions](#BodyTypeOptions) enum

Specifies the topological type of a body, similar to BodyType, with
annotations.

See also

[`BodyType`](#BodyType)

  Value              Description
  ------------------ -------------
  `SOLID`            
  `SHEET`            
  `WIRE`             
  `POINT`            
  `MATE_CONNECTOR`   
  `COMPOSITE`        

[initialQueryPredicate](#initialQueryPredicate-map)
(definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map)) predicate

Predicate showing the selection type and the relevant queries/enum
allowed by this type.

[additionalQueryPredicate](#additionalQueryPredicate-map)
(addQ is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map)) predicate

Same as initialQueryPredicate, needs to be separate because of naming
restriction in array parameters.

[queryVariable](#queryVariable-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Feature to create a query variable via calling `setQueryVariable`. This
variable may be used in featurescript via call `getQueryVariable` or in
the UI by clicking the \"Variable selection\" dropdown in the feature
dialog or by selecting the query variable feature in the feature list.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `name`            | [`string`](/FsDoc/v   | The name of the       |
|                       | ariables.html#string) | feature. Must not     |
|                       |                       | belong to a non-query |
|                       |                       | variable feature. If  |
|                       |                       | a query variable      |
|                       |                       | feature with this     |
|                       |                       | name exists, it will  |
|                       |                       | be overwritten after  |
|                       |                       | this feature.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `description`     | [`string`](/FsDoc/v   | Description of the    |
|                       | ariables.html#string) | variable. Maximum     |
|                       |                       | length of 256         |
|                       |                       | characters.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `selectionType`   | [`SelectionT          | The type of selection |
|                       | ype`](#SelectionType) | the initial query     |
|                       |                       | will hold.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `seedType`        | [`                    | If the selection type |
|                       | SeedType`](#SeedType) | allows edges or       |
|                       |                       | faces, selects the    |
|                       |                       | seed type.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `selectionQuery`  | [`Query`](#Query)     | If selectionType is   |
|                       |                       | SELECTION, query that |
|                       |                       | will be contained in  |
|                       |                       | the variable.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Featur              | If selectionType is   |
|   `createdByFeatures` | eList`](#FeatureList) | CREATED_BY, features  |
|                       |                       | whose created         |
|                       |                       | entities will be      |
|                       |                       | contained in the      |
|                       |                       | variable.             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `seedBodies`      | [`Query`](#Query)     | If selectionType is   |
|                       |                       | OWNED_BY or           |
|                       |                       | EDGE_CONVEXITY,       |
|                       |                       | bodies owning the     |
|                       |                       | entities that will be |
|                       |                       | contained in the      |
|                       |                       | variable.             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `seedFaces`       | [`Query`](#Query)     | If selectionType is   |
|                       |                       | PROTRUSION or POCKET  |
|                       |                       | or HOLE or FILLETS or |
|                       |                       | BOUNDED_FACES, or     |
|                       |                       | TANGENT_CONNECTED or  |
|                       |                       | MATCHING and seedType |
|                       |                       | is FACE, faces from   |
|                       |                       | which the selection   |
|                       |                       | is created.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | If selectionType is   |
|    `seedEdgesOrFaces` |                       | LOOP_CHAIN_CONNECTED, |
|                       |                       | faces or edges from   |
|                       |                       | which the loops are   |
|                       |                       | computed.             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | If selectionType is   |
|    `seedEdgesOrFaces` |                       | PARALLEL, or          |
|                       |                       | TANGENT_CONNECTED or  |
|                       |                       | MATCHING and seedType |
|                       |                       | is EDGE, edges from   |
|                       |                       | which the selection   |
|                       |                       | is created.           |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `entityType`      | [`Enti                | If selectionType is   |
|                       | tyType`](#EntityType) | CREATED_BY or         |
|                       |                       | OWNED_BY, the entity  |
|                       |                       | type to include in    |
|                       |                       | the variable.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`FilletComp          | If selectionType is   |
|   `filletCompareType` | are`](#FilletCompare) | FILLETS, the type of  |
|                       |                       | fillets to include in |
|                       |                       | the variable.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | If selectionType is   |
|  `boundedFacesBounds` |                       | BOUNDED_FACES, the    |
|                       |                       | faces or edges        |
|                       |                       | bounding the          |
|                       |                       | selection.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`EdgeConvexityType`  | If selectionType is   |
|   `edgeConvexityType` | ](#EdgeConvexityType) | EDGE_CONVEXITY, the   |
|                       |                       | convexity type of     |
|                       |                       | edges to include in   |
|                       |                       | the variable.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether to include    |
| addAdditionalQueries` | riables.html#boolean) | addition queries in   |
|                       |                       | the variable.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | An array of           |
|   `additionalQueries` | variables.html#array) | additional queries to |
|                       |                       | include. Each item\'s |
|                       |                       | content is analogous  |
|                       |                       | to what is contained  |
|                       |                       | in the original       |
|                       |                       | query. It also        |
|                       |                       | contains a            |
|                       |                       | `booleanOperation`    |
|                       |                       | field determining how |
|                       |                       | to combine the        |
|                       |                       | additional query with |
|                       |                       | the current query.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `evaluateOnUse`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether to evaluate   |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | the variable when it  |
|                       |                       | is created or when it |
|                       |                       | is used.              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `showSelection`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether to highlight  |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | the entities          |
|                       |                       | contained in the      |
|                       |                       | created variable.     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

## [rib](#module-rib.fs) {#module-rib.fs .file-header}

[RibExtrusionDirection](#RibExtrusionDirection) enum

Specifies the direction of the rib extrusion starting from the profile
going up to the part.

  Value                        Description
  ---------------------------- -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `PARALLEL_TO_SKETCH_PLANE`   The direction of the rib extrusion goes parallel to the profile sketch plane.
  `NORMAL_TO_SKETCH_PLANE`     The direction of the rib extrusion goes normal to the profile sketch plane.

[rib](#rib-Context-Id-map) (context is [Context](#Context),
id is [Id](#Id), definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Creates ribs from selected profiles. The ribs can be either free
standing or merged with their mating part. Profiles must be
non-construction sketch edges.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `profiles`        | [`Query`](#Query)     | Edges which form the  |
|                       |                       | center lines of the   |
|                       |                       | ribs.                 |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `parts`           | [`Query`](#Query)     | Parts which form the  |
|                       |                       | boundary of the ribs. |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `thickness`       | [`ValueWithUni        | Thickness of the      |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | ribs.                 |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `r                | [`RibEx               | Whether the rib is    |
| ibExtrusionDirection` | trusionDirection`](#R | extruded              |
|                       | ibExtrusionDirection) | perpendicular or      |
|                       |                       | parallel to the       |
|                       |                       | plane.                |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether the ribs are  |
|   `oppositeDirection` | riables.html#boolean) | extruded in the       |
|                       |                       | positive or negative  |
|                       |                       | direction.            |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `hasDraft`        | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to add a     |
|                       |                       | > draft to the rib.   |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `draftAngle`      | [`ValueWithUni        | *Required if          |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) | `hasDraft` is `true`* |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | The angle of the      |
|                       |                       | draft with respect to |
|                       |                       | the extruded          |
|                       |                       | direction of the rib. |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `10 * degree`       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | *Optional*            |
|  `draftPullDirection` | riables.html#boolean) |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `false` to draft    |
|                       |                       | > outwards (default)  |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | EXAMPLE               |
|                       |                       |                       |
|                       |                       | > `true` to draft     |
|                       |                       | > inwards             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `ex               | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether the ribs are  |
| tendProfilesUpToPart` | riables.html#boolean) | extruded up to a      |
|                       |                       | boundary part.        |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `mergeRibs`       | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | Whether the ribs are  |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | merged with the       |
|                       |                       | mating part.          |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

## [sheetMetalAttribute](#module-sheetMetalAttribute.fs) {#module-sheetMetalAttribute.fs .file-header}

Modules prefixed with \"sheetMetal\" here and below control
functionality related to working with sheet metal models in Onshape.

Sheet metal models are created with the
[`sheetMetalStart`](#sheetMetalStart-Context-Id-map) feature. The
geometry of these models is not modifiable with ordinary geometry
operations, and an operation which attempts to modify a sheet metal
model will always throw the error
`ErrorStringEnum.SHEET_METAL_PARTS_PROHIBITED`

Onshape\'s sheet metal operations are instead encapsulated in features
defined with
[`defineSheetMetalFeature`](#defineSheetMetalFeature-function-map).
These features directly modify the underlying sheet metal master body, a
hidden surface body not accessible from other features. The master body
(along with [`SMAttribute`](#SMAttribute)s set on its entities) provides
the information necessary for
[`updateSheetMetalGeometry`](#updateSheetMetalGeometry-Context-Id-map)
to build both sheet metal bodies: the 3D folded body and the flat
pattern. The result is simultaneous sheet metal editing, where geometry
and errors are always available to the end user on both the folded and
the flat sheet metal models.

Most custom features will function only on bodies which are not active
sheet metal, because the feature\'s effects are not readily translatable
from the folded model back to the flattened master model. A custom
feature\'s user will typically discover this when an operation within
the custom feature throws a `SHEET_METAL_PARTS_PROHIBITED` error, giving
the user-facing message \"Active sheet metal models are not allowed.\"

Additionally, a custom feature\'s query parameter can disallow selection
of entities from sheet metal bodies using the
[ActiveSheetMetal.NO](#ActiveSheetMetal) filter. Any other query can be
filtered for non-sheet-metal geometry using
[`separateSheetMetalQueries`](#separateSheetMetalQueries-Context-Query).

[SMAttribute](#SMAttribute) type

Sheet metal object definition attribute type.

[canBeSMAttribute](#canBeSMAttribute-) (value) predicate

parameters in SMAttribute (e.g. radius in BEND, angle in JOINT,
thickness in MODEL) are specified as maps

EXAMPLE

> {
>      value : {ValueWithUnits},
>      canBeEdited : {boolean},
>      controllingFeatureId : {string}, : feature to be edited when editing this parameter
>      parameterIdInFeature : {string}
>      }

[smAttributeDefault](#smAttributeDefault) const

Empty map as SMAttribute convenient for attribute lookup

[asSMAttribute](#asSMAttribute-map)
(value is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))
returns [SMAttribute](#SMAttribute)

Attach SMAttribute type to a map. convenient for attribute lookup and
queries.

[SMAssociationAttribute](#SMAssociationAttribute) type

Used by sheet metal features to maintain correspondence between master
sheet body entities and folded and flat solid body entities.

[canBeSMAssociationAttribute](#canBeSMAssociationAttribute-) (value)
predicate

Association attribute stores `attributeId`. The association is
established by assigning the same attribute to associated entities.
Every entity in sheet metal master sheet body has a distinct association
attribute.

[makeSMAssociationAttribute](#makeSMAssociationAttribute-string)
(attributeId is [string](/FsDoc/variables.html#string))
returns [SMAssociationAttribute](#SMAssociationAttribute)

Create an association attribute with the given `attributeId`.

[assignSMAssociationAttributes](#assignSMAssociationAttributes-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), entities is [Query](#Query))

Assign new association attributes to entities using their transient
queries to generate attribute ids.

[smAssociationAttributePattern](#smAssociationAttributePattern) const

An attribute pattern for finding attributes which are
[`SMAssociationAttribute`](#SMAssociationAttribute)s.

[getSMAssociationAttributes](#getSMAssociationAttributes-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), entities is [Query](#Query))

Get all of the association attributes for a given set of `entities`.

[SMCornerBreak](#SMCornerBreak) type

Information corresponding to a single sheet metal corner break (fillet
or chamfer)

[canBeSMCornerBreak](#canBeSMCornerBreak-) (value) predicate

Corner break must hold the break style, the range (radius and distance
of fillet and chamfer respectively), and the wallId of the wall that
owns the corner.

[makeSMCornerBreak](#makeSMCornerBreak-SMCornerBreakStyle-ValueWithUnits-string)
(cornerBreakStyle is [SMCornerBreakStyle](#SMCornerBreakStyle),
range is [ValueWithUnits](#ValueWithUnits),
wallId is [string](/FsDoc/variables.html#string))
returns [SMCornerBreak](#SMCornerBreak)

Create a corner break

[addCornerBreakToSMAttribute](#addCornerBreakToSMAttribute-SMAttribute-map)
(attribute is [SMAttribute](#SMAttribute),
cornerBreakMap is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))
returns [SMAttribute](#SMAttribute)

Adds an SMCornerBreak and any additional information to an SMAttribute,
initializing the cornerBreaks array if necessary.

[findCornerBreak](#findCornerBreak-SMAttribute-string)
(attribute is [SMAttribute](#SMAttribute),
wallId is [string](/FsDoc/variables.html#string))

Finds an SMCornerBreak in attribute corresponding to wallId, returns
undefined if nothing found

[updateCornerAttribute](#updateCornerAttribute-Context-Query-SMAttribute)
(context is [Context](#Context), vertex is [Query](#Query),
attribute is [SMAttribute](#SMAttribute))

Clears existing SMAttribute, sets new one only if non-trivial

[sanitizeControllingInformation](#sanitizeControllingInformation-Context-SMAttribute-boolean)
(context is [Context](#Context),
attribute is [SMAttribute](#SMAttribute),
replaceExisting is [boolean](/FsDoc/variables.html#boolean))
returns [SMAttribute](#SMAttribute)

Removes all controllingFeatureId and parameterIdInFeature information
from an SMAttribute. Replaces the provided attribute with sanitized
attribute if `replaceExisting` is true. Return the sanitized attribute

Fail if the attribute is a model attribute as a safety precaution, as
removing the controllingFeatureId information from a model attribute
would invalidate it from being the same model attribute as it was before

## [sheetMetalCornerBreak](#module-sheetMetalCornerBreak.fs) {#module-sheetMetalCornerBreak.fs .file-header}

[EdgeBlendType](#EdgeBlendType) enum

Specifies type of edge blend

  Value       Description
  ----------- -------------
  `FILLET`    
  `CHAMFER`   

[sheetMetalCornerBreak](#sheetMetalCornerBreak-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Sheet metal specific feature combining functionality of edge fillet and
chamfer. It calls [`SMEdgeBlendImpl`](#SMEdgeBlendImpl-Context-Id-map)
to apply fillets or chamfers in flat and then change the definition
surface accordingly As a result of this change rips corner/bend reliefs
are also \"baked\" into the definition surface and flexibility of sheet
metal model is lost. For this reason we recommend that this feature is
used after sheet metal flanges, joints and reliefs are finalized.

## [sheetMetalEnd](#module-sheetMetalEnd.fs) {#module-sheetMetalEnd.fs .file-header}

[sheetMetalEnd](#sheetMetalEnd-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Deactivate the sheet metal model of selected parts. Continued modeling
on deactivated sheet metal parts will not be represented in the flat
pattern or the table.

## [sheetMetalFlange](#module-sheetMetalFlange.fs) {#module-sheetMetalFlange.fs .file-header}

[SMFlangeAlignment](#SMFlangeAlignment) enum

Describes the position of a virtual sharp with respect to \"flange
face\", defined as the face that corresponds to the edge selected for
flange in the underlying sheet.

For Middle alignment, the virtual sharp at the intersection of the
existing sheet and the sheet that corresponds to the flange wall, lies
in the middle of the flange face.

For Inner alignment, the virtual sharp at the intersection of the planes
defined by the faces of the solid to the interior of the bend, lies
coincident with the edge of the flange face closest to the bend.

For Outer alignment, the virtual sharp at the intersection of the planes
defined by the faces of the solid to the exterior of the bend, lies
coincident with the edge of the flange face farthest from the bend.

  Value      Description
  ---------- -------------
  `INNER`    
  `OUTER`    
  `MIDDLE`   
  `BEND`     

[SMPartialFlangeChainType](#SMPartialFlangeChainType) enum

Sets the handling for chains of edges while creating a partial flange.

  Value         Description
  ------------- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  `PER_EDGE`    The partial flange conditions will be applied to the ends of each individual edge.
  `PER_CHAIN`   The partial flange conditions will be applied to the ends of each chain of selected edges.

[sheetMetalFlange](#sheetMetalFlange-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Create sheet metal flanges on selected edges of sheet metal parts.
Length of flange may be defined by distance (as measured from the
virtual sharp along outer edge of wall) or limiting entity. Bend angle
may be flipped using the oppositeDirection flag. When auto-miter is not
selected, flange sides are rotated by miter angle.

## [sheetMetalFormed](#module-sheetMetalFormed.fs) {#module-sheetMetalFormed.fs .file-header}

[sheetMetalFormed](#sheetMetalFormed-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Creates forms of specified dimensions and style, based either on
standard forms, or by user-defined forms. Each form\'s position and
orientation are specified using sketch points or mate connectors. For
sketch points sketch coordinate system specifies orientation.

attached to its its flat pattern Is the implementation of sheet metal
extrude in flat.

## [sheetMetalJoint](#module-sheetMetalJoint.fs) {#module-sheetMetalJoint.fs .file-header}

[sheetMetalJoint](#sheetMetalJoint-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

sheetMetalJoint feature modifies sheet metal joint by changing its
attribute.

## [sheetMetalLoft](#module-sheetMetalLoft.fs) {#module-sheetMetalLoft.fs .file-header}

[sheetMetalLoft](#sheetMetalLoft-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Create or add to existing sheet metal parts by selecting two profiles to
loft. Adjust chordal tolerance to change loft resolution. Rips are
automatically added to closed profiles. Operations on sheet metal models
are automatically represented as a flat pattern, and joints and bends
are listed in a table.

## [sheetMetalMakeJoint](#module-sheetMetalMakeJoint.fs) {#module-sheetMetalMakeJoint.fs .file-header}

[MakeJointType](#MakeJointType) enum

MakeJointType is a subset of SMJointType to restrict options visible in
sheetMetalMakeJoint

  Value    Description
  -------- -------------
  `BEND`   
  `RIP`    

[sheetMetalMakeJoint](#sheetMetalMakeJoint-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Produces a sheet metal joint of type RIP or BEND by extending or
trimming walls of selected edges. Rip is created as an edge joint by
default.

[SMProcessType](#SMProcessType) enum

Method of initializing sheet metal model

  `CONVERT`   
  `EXTRUDE`   
  `THICKEN`

Bend calculation setting

[BEND_RELIEF_WIDTH_SCALE_BOUNDS](#BEND_RELIEF_WIDTH_SCALE_BOUNDS) const

Bend relief width scale bounds

const

Manipulator name for the \"flip direction up\" manipulator

[sheetMetalModelParameters](#sheetMetalModelParameters-map)
(definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map)) predicate

A predicate containing the parameters required to define all parameters
for a sheet metal model.

[sheetMetalStart](#sheetMetalStart-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Create and activate a sheet metal model by converting existing parts,
extruding sketch curves or thickening. All operations on an active sheet
metal model will automatically be represented in the flat pattern and
the table. Sheet metal models may consist of multiple parts. Multiple
sheet metal models can be active.

[convertExistingPart](#convertExistingPart-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Convert an existing body into a sheet metal part. Definition should
include all parameters from
[`sheetMetalModelParameters`](#sheetMetalModelParameters-map).

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Parameter             | Type                  | Additional Info       |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
| `definition`          | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `partToConvert`   | [`Query`](#Query)     | The body to convert.  |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `facesToExclude`  | [`Query`](#Query)     | Input faces to        |
|                       |                       | exclude from the      |
|                       |                       | sheet metal model.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `bends`           | [`Query`](#Query)     | Edges to represent as |
|                       |                       | bends in the sheet    |
|                       |                       | metal model. All      |
|                       |                       | other nonlaminar      |
|                       |                       | edges will be         |
|                       |                       | converted to rips.    |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `clearance`       | [`ValueWithUni        | Clearance from input. |
|                       | ts`](#ValueWithUnits) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `bendsIncluded`   | [`boolean`](/FsDoc/va | If `true`, bends will |
|                       | riables.html#boolean) | be included in        |
|                       |                       | clearance             |
|                       |                       | calculations.         |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[K_FACTOR_BOUNDS](#K_FACTOR_BOUNDS) const

A `RealBoundSpec` for sheet metal K-factor between 0. and 1., defaulting
to `.45`.

[ROLLED_K_FACTOR_BOUNDS](#ROLLED_K_FACTOR_BOUNDS) const

A `RealBoundSpec` for rolled sheet metal K-factor between 0. and 1.,
defaulting to `.5`.

[SM_MINIMAL_CLEARANCE_BOUNDS](#SM_MINIMAL_CLEARANCE_BOUNDS) const

A `LengthBoundSpec` for minimal clearance of sheet metal rips

[SM_BEND_RADIUS_BOUNDS](#SM_BEND_RADIUS_BOUNDS) const

A `LengthBoundSpec` for bend radius in sheet metal features

[SM_THICKNESS_BOUNDS](#SM_THICKNESS_BOUNDS) const

A `LengthBoundSpec` for thickness in sheet metal features. default to
`(1/16)"` (i.e. steel)

[SM_RELIEF_SIZE_BOUNDS](#SM_RELIEF_SIZE_BOUNDS) const

A `LengthBoundSpec` for relief size, corners or bend relief, in sheet
metal features.

[partitionSheetMetalParts](#partitionSheetMetalParts-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), allParts is [Query](#Query))

Partitions allParts into non-sheet metal parts and sheet metal parts. To
preserve existing behavior of code the returned non-sm query is exactly
the same as what is passed in for non-sm cases and a query is returned
for them. The sheet metal results will usually be iterated through and
so are returned as a map with the keys being the sheet metal ID and the
values being the parts associated with that model.

See also

[`separateSheetMetalQueries`](#separateSheetMetalQueries-Context-Query)

[getActiveSheetMetalId](#getActiveSheetMetalId-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), query is [Query](#Query))

Get the first id of active sheet metal model the entities of query
belong to.

[getModelParameters](#getModelParameters-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), model is [Query](#Query))
returns [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map)

Extract sheet metal model parameters in a convenient form

[separateSheetMetalQueries](#separateSheetMetalQueries-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), targets is [Query](#Query))
returns [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map)

Separates queries which are part of an active sheet metal model (either
in the folded model or the flat pattern).

See also

[`partitionSheetMetalParts`](#partitionSheetMetalParts-Context-Query)

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Return                | Type                  | Description           |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
|                       | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | `targets` which are   |
|   `sheetMetalQueries` |                       | part of an active     |
|                       |                       | sheet metal model     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`Query`](#Query)     | `targets` which are   |
| nonSheetMetalQueries` |                       | not part of an active |
|                       |                       | sheet metal model     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[sheetMetalExtendSheetBodyCall](#sheetMetalExtendSheetBodyCall-Context-Id-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Wrapper around opExtendSheetBody used in sheet metal operations to
handle remapping of cornerBreak data

[sheetMetalEdgeChangeCall](#sheetMetalEdgeChangeCall-Context-Id-Query-map)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
edges is [Query](#Query),
definition is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Wrapper around opEdgeChange used in sheet metal operations to handle
remapping of cornerBreak data

[sheetMetalDeripCall](#sheetMetalDeripCall-Context-Id-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), id is [Id](#Id),
edges is [Query](#Query))

Wrapper around opEdgeChange used in sheet metal operations to handle
remapping of cornerBreak data

[getOwnerSMModel](#getOwnerSMModel-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), selection is [Query](#Query))
returns [array](/FsDoc/variables.html#array)

Returns an array of sm models associated with selection in a way that
works outside of sheet metal features.

[getSMCorrespondingInPart](#getSMCorrespondingInPart-Context-Query-EntityType)
(context is [Context](#Context), selection is [Query](#Query),
entityType is [EntityType](#EntityType)) returns [Query](#Query)

Returns a query for all sheet metal part entities of entityType related
to the input sheet metal model entities.

[collectCornerBreakTracking](#collectCornerBreakTracking-Context-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), bodies is [Query](#Query))
returns [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map)

Collect information before adding material which may merge sheet metal
walls. The map returned by this function should be passed directly into
[`remapCornerBreaks`](#remapCornerBreaks-Context-map) after making the
desired geometry changes.

Only walls which have broken corners are tracked.

+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| Return                | Type                  | Description           |
+=======================+=======================+=======================+
|                       | [`map`](/FsDo         |                       |
|                       | c/variables.html#map) |                       |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `wa               | [`map`](/FsDo         | a map from wall id to |
| llIdToPersistentWall` | c/variables.html#map) | a tracked query for   |
|                       |                       | the wall              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `wallId           | [`array`](/FsDoc/     | a map from wall id to |
| ToVerticesWithBreaks` | variables.html#array) | an array of tracked   |
|                       |                       | vertices which break  |
|                       |                       | the wall              |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

[remapCornerBreaks](#remapCornerBreaks-Context-map)
(context is [Context](#Context),
cornerBreakTracking is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map))

Remap corner breaks on walls whose wall id has changed. Takes the output
of
[`collectCornerBreakTracking`](#collectCornerBreakTracking-Context-Query)
as `cornerBreakTracking`.

[getSelectionsForSMDefinitionEntities](#getSelectionsForSMDefinitionEntities-Context-Query-Query)
(context is [Context](#Context), definitionEntities is [Query](#Query),
originalSelections is [Query](#Query))

Map a group of sheet metal definition entities back to the original
entities selected by the user.

(context is [Context](#Context), targets is [Query](#Query),
version is [FeatureScriptVersionNumber](#FeatureScriptVersionNumber))

Separates queries which are part of an active sheet metal model (either
in the folded model or the flat pattern) with additional separation of

| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | `targets` which are   |
|   `sheetMetalQueries` |                       | part of an active     |
|                       |                       | sheet metal model     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -   `                 | [`Query`](#Query)     | `targets` which are   |
| nonSheetMetalQueries` |                       | not part of an active |
|                       |                       | sheet metal model     |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+
| -                     | [`Query`](#Query)     | `targets` which are   |
|  `legacyModelQueries` |                       | part of an active     |
|                       |                       | sheet metal model     |
|                       |                       | with fsVersion        |
|                       |                       | earlier than          |
|                       |                       | `version`             |
+-----------------------+-----------------------+-----------------------+

|                       |                       | part of an active     |

|                       |                       | or later than         |

[prepareInitialArcSketch](#prepareInitialArcSketch-boolean-map-ValueWithUnits-ValueWithUnits)
(wrapAroundFront is [boolean](/FsDoc/variables.html#boolean),
modelParameters is [map](/FsDoc/variables.html#map),

Prepare to sketch the initial arc of the hem or flange, starting at the
